Some items may not appear in their expected locations. This usually happens
If you import items individually (such as bundle items, cages, attachments, etc.),
they may not be placed correctly. This occurs because RBX Toolbox moves the
selection to the origin relative to the number of items selected.
If you disable Spawn at Origin, the items will appear in their correct positions,
but they may be located far from the Blender origin.
